'''Rim Commercial Mining''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation which operated in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid]] to [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the company was one of the largest mining corporations in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In this time, it was headed by [[Ja'Boag]], who mined [[uranium]] that powered worlds from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to those in the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]].

{{Company-stub}}
